about_page_description: Discover Roshetta, the world's first integrated healthcare ecosystem combining medical excellence with protection innovation.
about_page_keywords: Roshetta, integrated healthcare, medical consultations, general medical care, comprehensive care, healthcare platform
about_discover_description: Explore Roshetta's revolutionary platform for comprehensive healthcare for body and mind.
about_join_millions: Join millions experiencing the power of integrated healthcare with Roshetta.
about_ecosystem_description: The world's first integrated healthcare ecosystem uniting care and protection
about_journey_subtitle: Discover the revolution reshaping healthcare forever
about_medical_care_description: Comprehensive medical services featuring specialized consultations and precise diagnostics with the finest doctors and specialists across all medical fields.
about_general_care_description: Leading general medical care platform providing protection, consultations, and support through innovative digital solutions.
about_integrated_description: An integrated system that combines medical and general medical care for the first time, providing comprehensive healthcare that treats care and protection as one unit.
about_capabilities_subtitle: Cutting-edge technologies born from perfect integration
about_comprehensive_healthcare_descripti: An integrated system combining medical expertise with protection innovation, providing unparalleled comprehensive healthcare.
about_advanced_security_description: High-level encryption protecting both physical and general medical care data with advanced privacy protocols across all platforms.
about_instant_connection_description: Quick access to doctors and general medical care specialists, removing barriers between patients and healthcare providers.
about_global_network_description: A global platform connecting specialists in medical and general medical care fields, making specialized care accessible anywhere.
about_impact_subtitle: The power of integration in numbers
about_technology_subtitle: Powered by cutting-edge technology to deliver exceptional healthcare experiences
about_ai_diagnostics_description: Advanced machine learning algorithms assist healthcare providers in accurate diagnosis and personalized treatment plans.
about_mobile_description: Seamless healthcare access through our responsive mobile platform, ensuring care is always at your fingertips.
about_smart_records_description: Intelligent health data management that provides comprehensive insights for both patients and healthcare providers.
about_security_description: Military-level encryption and security protocols ensuring your sensitive health information remains completely protected.
about_ready_description: Join millions who have discovered the power of integrated healthcare. Where medical excellence meets protection innovation.
privacy_hero_title: Your Health Privacy, Our Sacred Promise
privacy_hero_description: At Rosheta, we protect your medical information with the highest security standards. Your data is encrypted, secure, and never shared without your explicit permission.
privacy_commitment_description: At Rosheta, we understand that your health information is deeply personal. Our privacy practices are built on trust, transparency, and the highest security standards. We collect and use your data solely to provide you with exceptional healthcare services while keeping your information completely secure and private.
privacy_commitment_highlight_2: Your data is never sold or shared for profit
privacy_data_collection_description: We collect only the information necessary to provide you with quality healthcare services and ensure the best possible user experience.
privacy_data_usage_description: Every piece of data we collect serves a specific purpose in delivering better healthcare services to you.
privacy_healthcare_services_desc: Connecting you with qualified doctors and managing your health journey
privacy_platform_security_desc: Protecting your account and preventing unauthorized access
privacy_service_improvement_desc: Making our platform more user-friendly and efficient
privacy_data_protection_description: Your data security is our top priority. We employ multiple layers of protection to ensure your information remains safe and secure.
privacy_encryption_desc: 256-bit SSL encryption protects all data transmission and storage
privacy_servers_desc: Data stored on protected servers with restricted access
privacy_access_control_desc: Only authorized personnel can access your information
privacy_audits_desc: Continuous security monitoring and regular safety assessments
privacy_data_sharing_description: We never sell your data to third parties. Information sharing is limited to essential healthcare services and legal requirements only.
privacy_healthcare_providers_desc: Licensed doctors and medical professionals who provide your care
privacy_service_partners_desc: Trusted partners who help us deliver our services securely
privacy_legal_requirements_desc: Only when required by Egyptian law or emergency situations
privacy_your_rights_description: You have complete control over your personal information. These rights are yours by law and by our commitment to transparency.
privacy_access_data_desc: Request a copy of all information we have about you
privacy_access_action: Download your data anytime from your account settings
privacy_update_info_desc: Correct or update your personal and medical information
privacy_update_action: Edit your profile and medical history easily
privacy_delete_account_desc: Request complete deletion of your account and data
privacy_delete_action: Contact support for permanent account deletion
privacy_control_communications_desc: Choose what notifications and emails you receive
privacy_contact_description: Our dedicated privacy team is here to help you understand how we protect your information
privacy_acknowledgment_subtitle: By using Rosheta, you confirm that you understand and agree to our privacy practices
privacy_confirmation_1: I have read and understand this privacy policy
privacy_confirmation_2: I consent to the collection of my health information
privacy_confirmation_3: I understand my rights regarding my data
privacy_confirmation_4: I agree to the security measures described
privacy_confirmation_5: I know I can withdraw consent at any time
privacy_confirmation_6: I understand how my data may be shared
privacy_agree_label: I understand and agree to Rosheta's Privacy Policy
privacy_agree_sublabel: This includes data collection, usage, sharing, and my rights as described above.
privacy_withdraw_note: Note: You can change your privacy preferences or withdraw consent at any time by contacting our support team.
privacy_accept_button_disabled: Please read and accept our privacy policy
privacy_accept_message: Thank you! Your privacy preferences have been saved. Welcome to Rosheta - where your health data is always protected.
privacy_acceptance_info: Your acceptance is securely recorded • Policy version 3.0 • Last updated: January 2025
privacy_retention_title: How Long We Keep Your Data
